Canal instance 基本信息。: Basic information of the Canal instance.
Canal instance 处理binlog的TPS，以MySQL trans: TPS of binlog processing by the Canal instance, measured in MySQL transactions.
Canal instance 网络带宽占用。\ninbound: 读取MySQL:
Network bandwidth used by the Canal instance.
inbound: reading MySQL binlog.
outbound: transferring formatted binlog to the client.
Canal instance接收到的请求统计，结果按packet type分类。: Statistics of requests received by the Canal instance, grouped by packet type.
Instance处理binlog的TPS(以master变更行数table ro:
TPS of binlog processing by the instance (based on the number of changed table rows on the master).
put: TPS of put operations.
get: TPS of get operations.
ack: TPS of ack operations.
client 请求的GET与ACK包的QPS。: QPS of GET and ACK packets requested by the client.
master: Canal server相对于MySQL master的延时。通:
master: latency of the Canal server relative to the MySQL master. The master heartbeat mechanism refreshes the latency while idle.
put: based on the time point of the store put operation.
get: based on the time point of the client get operation.
ack: based on the time point of the client ack operation.
server响应GET请求，但返回空包的占比。: Ratio of GET requests answered by the server with an empty packet.
sink线程blocking占比；dump线程blocking占比(仅paral: Blocking ratio of the sink thread; blocking ratio of the dump thread (parallel mode only).
